reviews.review_msg: Be prepared to transcribe very lengthy, typed slides at high speed each lecture, or you'll miss something.

I'm not a calculus person. But he is great. Very clear, and if you go to lectures you will see he is very clear and caring. Take it with him. Midterms are easy, final is a bit tricky, but all the questions are from textbook. He doesn't try to trick you.

generally nice guy. exams are alright. however very harsh on giving out grades. A great portion of students failed(including me). lectures are extremely boring. Do not take his class unless you are a math person. he would spend whole lectures just proving theorems and then expect u to reproduce those long proofs on exam. very painful course!
